overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy, rain-soaked urban plaza beneath an elevated highway at night. The sequence begins in first-person perspective walking through neon-lit streets, then transitions to third-person view following a character with green hair wielding a large weapon as they explore the deserted cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the concrete overpass through the rain-soaked plaza, passing parked vehicles on the right

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure with support pillars spanning the width of the street
large illuminated advertisement on the overpass structure casting yellow light
rectangular concrete seating arranged in rows along the pedestrian walkway
futuristic vehicle with reflective wet surfaces parked along the curb
long horizontal light fixtures mounted under the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The area is dimly lit by fluorescent tubes and neon billboards, with concrete benches and parked sports cars lining the wet pedestrian walkway. The atmosphere is heavy with fog and rain, creating reflective surfaces on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air pedestrian plaza with neon storefronts

events.description: transitioning from fluorescent underpass lighting to area dominated by vibrant red and green neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing through the plaza passing rows of benches and approaching brightly lit neon storefronts

entered.detail: linear light fixtures suspended above the walkway illuminating the foggy atmosphere
bright red vertical neon sign with Japanese characters glowing intensely
green neon sign reading 'OPEN' in English letters
rectangular planters containing bushes and vegetation dividing the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the plaza, the environment opens up slightly while remaining under the overpass shadow. The lighting shifts to vibrant neon reds and greens from storefront signs, contrasting with the yellow fog. Concrete planters with vegetation appear in the center of the walkway as the camera advances through the deserted, rain-slicked commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza combat area with concrete cover and parked vehicles

events.description: camera perspective shifts from first-person to third-person following a character with green hair and tactical gear
character raises a large heavy rifle and aims down the sights while moving tactically

agents.ego_description: character with green hair wearing tactical gear, wielding a large heavy rifle and moving in a combat-ready stance through the plaza

entered.detail: large pink and purple neon sign with circular logo element glowing brightly
green sports car with reflective surfaces parked near the storefronts

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically to third-person view revealing a character with green hair and a large weapon. The character moves tactically through the foggy plaza, aiming their rifle while navigating around concrete benches and planters. A prominent pink neon sign glows in the background as the character advances through the rain-soaked environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with garage entrances and parked vehicles

events.description: character stops aiming weapon and resumes walking exploration, camera begins circling around the environment

agents.ego_description: character circling around concrete benches and planters, surveying the neon-lit surroundings while lowering their weapon

entered.detail: metal roll-up garage doors with horizontal slats and illuminated interior

segments.scene_description: The character continues exploring the plaza in a circular pattern, passing by garage entrances and parked vehicles. The camera orbits around the character, showcasing different angles of the neon-lit benches and wet pavement. The heavy rain and fog persist, creating atmospheric light rays from the overhead fluorescent fixtures as the character surveys the deserted cyberpunk street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-soaked urban plaza that shifts from a dimly lit industrial underpass into a vibrant, neon-saturated commercial zone. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, gliding past concrete benches and parked sports cars on a wet pedestrian walkway shrouded in heavy fog. As the camera advances deeper into the plaza, the oppressive gray atmosphere gives way to a more open space where the lighting transitions from pale fluorescent tubes to vivid neon reds and greens. The scene then expands further into the deserted commercial area, passing concrete planters with vegetation while the rain-slicked pavement reflects the intensifying glow of storefront signs.

The shot transitions from a first-person perspective into a sweeping third-person orbit of a tactical character navigating a rain-soaked urban plaza. It begins with a dramatic shift in view to reveal a green-haired combatant wielding a large rifle, moving cautiously past concrete benches and planters beneath the glow of a prominent pink neon sign. As the character advances through the heavy fog, the camera begins to circle them, shifting the perspective to capture the reflective wet pavement and dark garage entrances. The scene then expands into a wider orbital motion, showcasing the atmospheric light rays filtering through fluorescent fixtures and rain. Finally, the camera continues its rotation around the character as they survey the deserted, neon-lit street from multiple angles.
